# luci-examples module
> The commands.js module in the luci-examples application provides a web interface for configuring custom shell commands in OpenWrt.
> **Total Context:** ~100272 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [luci-examples-skeleton.md](./luci-examples-skeleton.md): Structural map for luci-examples that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~4066 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [luci-examples-complete-reference.md](./luci-examples-complete-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for luci-examples when a larger context window is available. (~100383 tokens, l4-monolith)
